# Third-Party Skills

This directory contains skills migrated from [nexu-io/html-anything](https://github.com/nexu-io/html-anything).

## Skill Count

75 skills covering:
- **deck** (20): PPT / Keynote slides (Swiss International, Guizang Editorial, etc.)
- **doc** (3): Document templates (Kami Parchment, etc.)
- **frame** (10): Hyperframes video frames
- **social** (4): Social media cards (Twitter, Xiaohongshu, Spotify, Reddit)
- **proto** (8): Web prototypes (SaaS landing, dashboard, brutalist, editorial, etc.)
- **office** (12): Office documents (PM spec, engineering runbook, finance report, HR onboarding, invoice, OKRs, meeting notes, weekly update, kanban, etc.)
- **resume** (1): Modern resume
- **poster** (1): Magazine-style poster
- **vfx** (1): Text cursor VFX
- **others** (15): Blog post, email marketing, waitlist page, pricing page, gamified app, etc.
